changes: Removed static vault index resolution block (NEXT_PUBLIC_VAULT_CLIENT, NEXT_PUBLIC_VAULT_RUN_ID, VAULT_INDEX_URL)
Added effectiveReportRun derived from router.query.reportRun || effectiveDisplayRun
Replaced static VAULT_INDEX_URL useEffect with dynamic graph_state.json fetch via /api/report-file?source=psee
Synthesizes vaultIndex from graph_state.json: signals map, artifacts map, claims map, export_status EXPORTED, base_url null
